arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Inter Milan vs. Bayern Munich (Champions League)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will travel to San Siro to face off with Inter Milan in the Champions League with a massive part of its season on the line. A look back at the first match and the results that each team had over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Inter deny premature celebrations after Kane barb
arts.sum: Inter Milan midfielder Henrikh Mkhitaryan denied his team had over-celebrated after beating Bayern Munich in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal.

arts.ttl: Kane demands better finishing as Bayern aim to turn around Inter deficit
arts.sum: Harry Kane has called on Bayern Munich to improve their finishing as they prepare for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie against Inter.

arts.ttl: Kompany addresses criticism of Kim Min-jae ahead of Inter showdown
arts.sum: At a press conference on Tuesday, Vincent Kompany addressed the criticism surrounding Kim Min-jae and looked ahead to Bayern’s decisive Champions League clash with Inter.

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Inter Milan and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: ‘It doesn’t get much bigger than this’ – Vincent Kompany ahead of Bayern Munich’s knockout game against Inter
arts.sum: Bayern Munich go to Inter needing to overturn a 2-1 deficit if they are to stand a chance of playing this season’s UEFA Champions League final at their Allianz Arena.…
